positive: An intricate, detailed steampunk clockwork illustration of a mythical winged creature (griffin or phoenix). Engraving style, cross-section view, brass and copper tones, gears, rivets, Victorian scientific illustration, highly detailed etching, blueprint aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, watercolor, simple line art, flat color
